ValidationRule.description: follow up date required when status = completed for specific task types
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(IP_TaskType__c, "Applicant Mailer"), ISPICKVAL(IP_TaskType__c, "Competitor Check-in"), ISPICKVAL(IP_TaskType__c, "Sales Call"), ISPICKVAL(IP_TaskType__c, "Sales Visit"), ISPICKVAL(IP_TaskType__c, "Spec Call"), ISPICKVAL(IP_TaskType__c, "Mailer/E-marketing"), ISPICKVAL(IP_TaskType__c, "Client Drop In") ), OR( AND( ISCHANGED(Status), ISPICKVAL(Status, "Completed"), ISBLANK(Follow_up_date__c), NOT(No_Future_Task__c) ), AND( ISNEW(), ISPICKVAL(Status, "Completed"), ISBLANK(Follow_up_date__c), NOT(No_Future_Task__c) ) ), OR( ISBLANK(WhatId), NOT(BEGINS(WhatId, "a8W")) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: When task is set to 'Completed', Follow up date or No Future Task is required to either automatically create your next task or ignore.
